_comment: Windows memory-forensics golden for MemLabs Lab 1 - Beginner's Luck.
MemLabs states all labs are Windows memory dumps. This is CTF-style ground truth, not a real incident report; do not publish the actual flag values here.

findings.description: Memory image contains evidence of a black command window or command execution near the crash time
findings.artifact_hint: Volatility consoles/cmdscan/cmdline output from MemLabs Lab 1

findings.description: Memory image preserves drawing or paint application activity from the user session
findings.artifact_hint: Process list, handles, filescan, or clipboard data for mspaint/drawing artifacts

findings.description: Three ordered CTF flags or important recovered files can be extracted from memory
findings.artifact_hint: filescan/dumpfiles/strings output; flag values intentionally omitted from the golden
